message.content:
@startuml
title public request directly to Gatekeeper

actor client
participant "auth_service" as auth_service
box "" #LightBlue2
  participant IDP
end box
participant "Gatekeeper" as gatekeeper
participant PASTA_service
database LDAP


client ->gatekeeper : "request" as public 
activate gatekeeper 

note right of gatekeeper: generate internal (public) token  
autonumber "<b>[0]"  

gatekeeper->PASTA_service :"request" internal (public) token   
deactivate gatekeeper 


loop authorize service    
    note over PASTA_service,PASTA_service#Bottom
    
        loop authorize resource     
            activate PASTA_service       
            
                alt perform service      
                    deactivate PASTA_service        
                    
                        else drop internal (public) token
                        
                            end if
            
             return response
        
         end loop
     
     end note
   
   end loop
  
return response



@enduml
